assertionResults.observation: Deterministic lifecycle fixtures cleared executable owner state on disconnect and the public real flow reloaded the selected owner after reconnect.
The recorded two-account flow removed the prior owner's drafts and activity, then restored only that owner's immutable records when selected again.
Cross-owner and reload fixtures kept receipts and activity scoped to their original account.

environment.network: Controlled Anvil and configured chain fixtures
environment.stack: Repository SDK web RPC indexer and journal test harness
